text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 You've been approved as a Moderator. Please check out the mod guidelines channel and introduce yourself to the team. We're glad to have you!
Welcome, guide_sam! 🎉 You've been approved as an Event Helper. Head over to the events channel to get started — the team is excited to have you on board!
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! 🎉 You've been approved as a Member. Feel free to introduce yourself and jump into any of the channels. Great to have you here!
Welcome, mentor_lina! 🎉 You've been approved as a Mentor. Please check out the mentorship channel and connect with the team — we're thrilled to have your expertise in the community!
